name: Knee Flexion
description: Bend your left knee to 90 degrees. Keep your back straight.
instructions: Stand upright with feet shoulder-width apart
Slowly bend your left knee upward
Hold at 90 degrees for 2 seconds
Lower your leg back down

name: Elbow Curl
description: Curl your right elbow to 45 degrees. Strengthen your bicep.
instructions: Stand with arm at your side
Keep your upper arm stationary
Curl your forearm upward to 45 degrees
Lower slowly

name: Shoulder Abduction
description: Raise your right arm to shoulder height (90 degrees).
instructions: Stand with arm at your side
Raise your arm outward (away from body)
Reach shoulder height (90 degrees)
Hold, then lower slowly

name: Hip Flexion
description: Lift your left knee to hip level (90 degrees hip flexion).
instructions: Stand upright holding a support
Slowly lift your left knee forward
Aim for 90 degrees at the hip
Hold and lower slowly

name: Ankle Dorsiflexion
description: Pull your left foot upward (toward the shin) 20 degrees.
instructions: Sit in a chair or stand
Lift your foot off the ground
Pull your toes up toward your shin
Hold, then relax

name: Full Knee Extension
description: Fully straighten your right knee to near full extension.
instructions: Sit in a chair with knee bent
Slowly straighten your right leg
Aim for near-full extension (170 degrees)
Hold and return to starting position
